name: Partnership Administrative Adjustment Request (AAR)

eligibility.description: Available to partnerships within 3 years of the return filing date, provided the IRS has not already mailed a notice of administrative proceeding for that year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A partnership can voluntarily file a request to adjust partnership-related items for a prior year to correct errors that resulted in overpayment of tax or under-reporting of deductions/credits.
